resultList.dtldesc: This sophisticated residential apartment offers a premium living experience in the rapidly developing corridor of Narsingi, Hyderabad. Situated within the esteemed Hallmark Sunnyside project, this property is designed for those who appreciate contemporary architecture and a well-balanced urban lifestyle. The development focuses on providing a tranquil residential environment while ensuring that all the modern conveniences and professional hubs of the city are within easy reach.::::Property Specifications::The apartment features a spacious and thoughtfully planned layout with a super area of 1,655 sq. ft. It comprises three well-proportioned bedrooms and three modern bathrooms, offering ample space and privacy for the entire family. Located on the 5th floor of a 6-storey building, the residence enjoys an ideal elevation that provides pleasant views and excellent natural ventilation throughout the year. The property is currently unfurnished, presenting a clean and versatile canvas for the new owners to customise the interiors according to their personal aesthetic and lifestyle requirements.::::Facilities::Residents of this exclusive development have access to a comprehensive range of world-class facilities designed for leisure, health, and security. The complex includes a modern clubhouse, a swimming pool, and a well-equipped gymnasium. For social gatherings and family recreation, there is a multipurpose hall, a dedicated children's play area, and beautifully landscaped gardens. The building is supported by essential infrastructure including high-speed lifts, reserved parking, and 24-hour security with advanced surveillance. A reliable power backup system and sustainable water management features are also integrated to ensure a seamless living experience.::::Locality::Narsingi is one of Hyderabad's most strategic and sought-after residential neighbourhoods, known for its superb connectivity and high-quality infrastructure. The property is located just a short drive from the Financial District and Gachibowli, making it an ideal home for professionals working in the city's major IT and corporate hubs. The area is well-connected via the Outer Ring Road, providing effortless access to the International Airport and other key parts of the city. The locality is surrounded by reputed international schools, premium healthcare facilities, and a variety of shopping and dining destinations, ensuring that all essential services are conveniently close by.

resultList.dtldesc: Own a spacious and elegantly designed 3 BHK Flat available for sale in Uppal, Hyderabad Situated in the vibrant locality of Uppal, this exquisite property offers an unparalleled living experience, blending spacious interiors with modern conveniences. With excellent connectivity to IT hubs, top schools, hospitals, and entertainment zones, Uppal is an ideal destination. Property Specifications Designed with Vastu principles in mind, this east-facing residence provides an ideal setting for harmonious living. Spanning an expansive super built-up area of 2,850 sq. ft., this stunning 3 BHK apartment is perched on the topmost floor of a four-storey building, offering privacy and exclusivity. Well-ventilated and naturally bright, this flat is adorned with sleek vitrified flooring, enhancing its contemporary appeal. Speaking about the floor plan, there are 3 well-ventilated bedrooms where you can relax after a hectic day. There are also 4 western-style bathrooms, where 3 bathrooms are attached to the bedrooms while an additional common bathroom ensures convenience for guests.Two balconies extend the living spaceone attached to a bedroom and another to the living areaoffering a refreshing outdoor retreat with views of the surrounding neighbourhood. Moreover, the apartment has distinct living and dining areas, creating an elegant and functional layout. The kitchen is well-equipped with a polished granite platform and a stainless steel sink, which makes cooking enjoyable. Facilities Designed for a comfortable and secure lifestyle, the apartment comes with a host of essential amenities such as a reliable borewell and Corporation water supply, covered parking space for two vehicles, complete power backup system that guarantees uninterrupted electricity, while a lift provides seamless access across all floors. Security is a top priority, with dedicated security guards and CCTV surveillance ensuring a safe and peaceful living environment.Locality Nestled in the well-connected area of Uppal, this residence enjoys proximity to all essential facilities. Some of the highly reputed schools and hospitals are within a 1 to 1.5 km radius, making it an ideal choice for families. Shopping malls and supermarkets, including Asian Multiplex just 1 km away, provide ample options for entertainment and daily essentials. Banks and ATM centers are conveniently located nearby, ensuring easy financial transactions. With public transport options readily available and Nagole Metro Station just 1.5 km away, commuting to different parts of Hyderabad is effortless.
